name: HWM_TM_REP_S_COMMON_ATRBS_V
query: SELECT CommonAtrbs.tm_rep_atrb_id Common_Time_Repos_Atrb_Id, CommonAtrbs.attribute_category Common_attribute_category, CommonAtrbs.attribute_varchar2 Common_internal_source, CommonAtrbs.attribute_varchar1 Common_Owner, CommonAtrbsUsg.usages_source_id, CommonAtrbsUsg.usages_source_version FROM hwm_tm_rep_atrbs CommonAtrbs, hwm_tm_rep_atrb_usages CommonAtrbsUsg WHERE CommonAtrbs.tm_rep_atrb_id = CommonAtrbsUsg.tm_rep_atrb_id and CommonAtrbs.attribute_category = 'CommonAttributes'
